calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A. a corporation.
Defendant Ignacio Delarosa was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 25, 2010.

Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, and good cause appearing, Judgment shall be entered in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, a corporation, and against defendant Ignacio Delarosa as follows:

Principal - $3,667.89.
Interest - $777.48.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $258.00.

Total - $4,703.35.

Defendant Ignacio Delarosa was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of this agreement.
Agreement of the parties for entry of judgment was accepted by the Court.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
